full_description: Keep the red block as the base, stack the green block on it, and then stack the blue block on the green block.
schema: {A} denotes the red block, {B} denotes the green block, {C} denotes the blue block, {a} denotes the arm on the red-block side, {b} denotes the arm that moves the green block, {c} denotes the arm that moves the blue block
preference: num of words should not exceed 20. Degree of detail avg 8
seen: Keep {A} in place, stack {B} on {A}, then stack {C} on {B}.
Build a stack with {A} at the bottom, {B} in the middle, and {C} on top.
Use {b} to stack {B} on {A}, then use {c} to stack {C} on {B}.
Make {A} the base, {B} the middle block, and {C} the top block.
Leave {A} where it is and complete the stack with {B} and {C}.
Stack the green block on the red block, then stack the blue block on the green block.
Form a three-block tower as {A}, {B}, then {C} from bottom to top.
Build the tower upward from {A} to {C}.
Keep {A} fixed, place {B} above it, and place {C} above {B}.
Use {B} as the middle support and {C} as the top block.
Complete the stack by setting {B} on {A} and {C} on {B}.
Place the blocks so {A} supports {B}, and {B} supports {C}.
Make a vertical stack with {A} below {B} and {B} below {C}.

Form a three-block stack with {A} bottom, {B} middle, and {C} top.

Complete the tower by setting {B} above {A} and {C} above {B}.
Make {A} the lower block, {B} the middle block, and {C} the upper block.
Build the tower step by step: {B} on {A}, then {C} on {B}.
